title: RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL - 211info
text: RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL AT LEGACY EMANUEL RANDALL CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Comprehensive medical center for children. Also offers a clinic that provides medical treatment and mental health support for gender non-conforming youth. 2801 N Gantenbein Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 276-6500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 276-6500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for emergency services. Call for information and to schedule an appointment for specialty services. FEES: Accepts Medicaid, and most private insurance plans. Uninsured patients may qualify for financial assistance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Hospitals * Children Transgender Hormone Therapy * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC SAFETY - CAR SAFETY SEAT STATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
